traces.simulated_condition: draft requests branch write or PR creation
traces.simulated_reason: write, PR, and merge authority remain disabled in the settled readiness posture
traces.expected_review_posture: hold the draft in sandbox review and route any future capability request through separate authority motions
traces.authority_note: no branch-write, PR-creation, merge, or runtime execution authority exists
traces.human_boundary_note: human operator review remains required before any opening or authority proposal

traces.simulated_condition: draft package omits required files or fails schema expectations
traces.simulated_reason: deterministic schema-valid package generation is still only partially satisfied by canon and current tooling
traces.expected_review_posture: revise the fixture or draft shape before treating it as review-ready
traces.authority_note: failure example does not trigger automation or runtime rejection
traces.human_boundary_note: human review decides whether the fixture is informative enough to retain

traces.simulated_condition: all simulated votes pass but operator approval has not been recorded
traces.simulated_reason: human override and approval boundary remain required where applicable
traces.expected_review_posture: show the trace as incomplete pending human review
traces.human_boundary_note: human intervention remains explicit and mandatory in the modeled flow

traces.simulated_condition: vote trace uses a role-lens or execution label instead of a canonical governance voter identity
traces.simulated_reason: recent settled posture requires jai-proposer, jai-challenger, and jai-arbiter in canonical vote traces
traces.expected_review_posture: flag the example as noncanonical and keep it as a failure example only
traces.authority_note: failure example documents review posture only and does not enforce runtime rejection
traces.human_boundary_note: human review distinguishes schema drift from valid governance voting identity shape

traces.simulated_condition: sandbox trace implies provider or model dispatch to produce or ratify a motion
traces.simulated_reason: sandbox boundary remains no-provider and no live-runtime by settled design
traces.expected_review_posture: keep the example as a blocked simulation and remove any live-dispatch implication from future fixtures
traces.authority_note: no provider/model dispatch or live agent runtime is granted
traces.human_boundary_note: human operator review remains responsible for preserving the no-provider sandbox boundary
